moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates with the final match on Sunday, July 19, bringing the month-long tournament to a close.

angles.name: Final Build-up
angles.copy: Just days to go until the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Who are you backing to lift the trophy on Sunday?

angles.name: Recap & Anticipation
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is almost here! Relive the best moments of the World Cup so far and predict your winner for Sunday's final.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Opening Day
angles.copy: It's here! The Open Championship 2026 begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick to win the Claret Jug?

angles.name: British Major Golf
angles.copy: Four days of world-class golf are about to get underway at Royal Birkdale. Tune in to catch all the action from The 154th Open.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Aftermath
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships concluded on July 12, with new champions crowned in the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles.

angles.name: Still Talking Wimbledon
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Wimbledon? What was your favourite moment from this year's championships?

angles.name: Unforgettable Finals
angles.copy: From surprise upsets to dominant performances, the 2026 Wimbledon finals delivered. What a tournament!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins today, July 15, bringing four days of music and culture to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, until July 18.

angles.name: HebCelt Live
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is officially underway! Who's heading to Stornoway for this incredible celebration of music and culture?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Four days of fantastic music, arts, and the unique atmosphere of the Outer Hebrides. HebCelt is the place to be this weekend!

moments.title: System Of A Down Final London Show
moments.blurb: System Of A Down play their final London date tonight, July 15, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

angles.name: Last Chance SOAD
angles.copy: Tonight's your last chance to catch System Of A Down in London at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium! Who's ready to mosh?

angles.name: Rocking London
angles.copy: System Of A Down are wrapping up their London residency tonight. What an epic few nights for rock fans in the capital!

moments.title: Beat Herder Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Beat Herder Festival kicks off tomorrow, July 16, in the Ribble Valley, featuring a diverse lineup of electronic and live music.

angles.name: Beat Herder Ready
angles.copy: Beat Herder Festival starts tomorrow! Get ready for a weekend of incredible music in the Ribble Valley.

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Faithless, Wilkinson, Sigma, and many more are heading to Beat Herder. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park in Nottingham from July 18-19, promising a weekend of music across five stages.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is just days away! Who's heading to Nottingham for a weekend of tunes at Wollaton Hall?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Get your festival gear ready! Splendour Festival brings a massive lineup to Nottingham this weekend.

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place at the London Stadium on Saturday, July 18.

angles.name: Track and Field Action
angles.copy: World-class athletes are coming to London Stadium this Saturday for the London Athletics Meet! Who's excited for some track and field action?

angles.name: Ready for the Race
angles.copy: Don't miss the London Athletics Meet this weekend! A chance to see global stars compete right here in the capital.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses and Velvet Revolver guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Slash
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary top hat-wearing guitar hero, Slash! What's your favourite riff from the Guns N' Roses icon?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain,' Slash has given us some unforgettable guitar solos. Join us in wishing him a happy birthday!

moments.title: Martin Gore turns 65
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode co-founder, songwriter, and guitarist Martin Gore celebrates his 65th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Martin Gore
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 65th Birthday to Depeche Mode's brilliant Martin Gore! What's your favourite Depeche Mode track?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: From 'Enjoy the Silence' to 'Personal Jesus,' Martin Gore's songwriting has shaped generations. Celebrate his birthday with some Depeche Mode classics!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Santana
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! Get lost in his incredible guitar solos today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: From Woodstock to 'Smooth,' Santana's sound is instantly recognizable. Crank up a classic and celebrate his birthday!

moments.title: Kim Carnes turns 81
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, known for the hit 'Bette Davis Eyes,' celebrates her 81st birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Kim Carnes
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the distinctive voice behind 'Bette Davis Eyes,' Kim Carnes! Still one of the coolest tracks of the 80s.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: That unmistakable rasp! Wishing a fantastic birthday to Kim Carnes. What's your favourite song from her?

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78
moments.blurb: Folk rock legend Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Cat Stevens
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens! What's the song that instantly transports you back to the 70s?

angles.name: Timeless Troubadour
angles.copy: From 'Father and Son' to 'Wild World,' his music is timeless. Celebrate Yusuf Islam's birthday with his beautiful songs.

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 21.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Don Henley
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his vocals?

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, Don Henley's voice is unmistakable. Celebrate his birthday with some classic rock!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, takes place from July 23-26 at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring music, arts, comedy, and more.

angles.name: Latitude Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to Latitude Festival is ON! Henham Park is getting ready for a huge weekend of music and arts, starting next Thursday.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating 20 years of Latitude! Who's excited for a weekend of discovery in Suffolk next week?

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Approaching
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games are set to begin on July 23, running until August 2, with over 3,000 athletes competing across various sports.

angles.name: Commonwealth Countdown
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up for the Commonwealth Games! The action kicks off next week, July 23rd. Who's excited to cheer on their nation?

angles.name: Sporting Spectacle
angles.copy: Get ready for 11 days of elite sport as the Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow! What events are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Pop icon, actress, and businesswoman Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24.

angles.name: Happy Birthday JLo
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo! What's your favourite hit from the multi-talented superstar?

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: From dance anthems to romantic ballads, Jennifer Lopez always brings the heat. Celebrate her birthday with her biggest tracks!

moments.title: Verdine White turns 75
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist and co-founder Verdine White celebrates his 75th birthday on July 25.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Verdine
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire! Get your groove on to their timeless hits.

angles.name: Boogie Wonderland Bass
angles.copy: That iconic bassline! Celebrate Verdine White's birthday with some Earth, Wind & Fire magic. What's your favourite EWF song?

moments.title: Ann Droid on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan's new quirky comedy 'Ann Droid' premiered on BBC on July 11, set in 2029 and following a grieving widow and her eldercare robot.

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: Have you caught 'Ann Droid' on BBC yet? Diane Morgan's new comedy is already getting people talking!

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: If you need a laugh, 'Ann Droid' is your new go-to. Quirky, witty, and perfectly timed. Available now on BBC iPlayer.

moments.title: The Dark - New ITV Thriller
moments.blurb: ITV's new moody crime thriller 'The Dark,' starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is airing this July.

angles.name: New ITV Drama
angles.copy: Looking for your next TV obsession? ITV's new crime thriller 'The Dark' promises a gripping watch this July.

angles.name: Crime Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Into moody thrillers? 'The Dark' on ITV is set to be a must-watch, with a compelling cast and an eerie Scottish setting.
